---
title: "Paracou microclimate data"
author: Sylvain Schmitt -
date: today
date-format: medium
format: 
  gfm:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

Data from sensors in Paracou (listed data below). Available projects are :

-   ALT : description with link.

Available sensors are :

-   TOMST : description with link.

```{r, comment=""}
fs::dir_tree(recurse = 1)
```
